calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: THOMAS J. LA LANNE, ESQ. FOR RESPONDENTS, WHO ARE ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY; KAREN Y. UCHIYAMA, ESQ. FOR APPELLANT MR. SASAN TEHRANI, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT; THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO ALL PARTIES; BOTH COUNSEL SIGN STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM; THE COURT HEARS ORAL STATEMENTS BY BOTH COUNSEL LA LANNE, FOLLOWED BY STATEMENTS BY COUNSEL UCHIYAMA. BOTH COUNSEL PRESENT TRIAL BRIEFS TO THE COURT FOR READING AND REVIEW; ALSO, THE COURT HEARS TESTIMONY BY RESPONDENT MS. JENNIFER GETTE, PREVIOUSLY SWORN, BOTH DIRECT AND CROSS-EXAM BY RESPECTIVE COUNSEL, IN ADDITION TO HEARING ORAL TESTIMONY BY MR. GETTE, PREVIOUSLY SWORN, WHO IS ALSO EXAMINED BY BOTH COUNSEL. AT 10:20 A.M. APPELLANT MR. SASAN TEHRANI, PREVIOUSLY SWORN, PRESENTS ORAL STATEMENTS TO THE COURT ON HIS OWN BEHALF AS APPELLANT IN THE CAUSE; COUNSEL UCHIYAMA PRESENTS DOCUMENTARY EXHIBITS FOR THE COURT'S REVIEW ON BEHALF OF APPELLANT. THEREUPON, THE COURT HEARS CLOSING STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH COUNSEL AND THEN TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION; THE COURT ADVISES COUNSEL AND PARTIES THEY WILL RECEIVE THE COURT'S DECISION IN THE MAIL.

JUDGE PRO TEM ROGER W. SLIGHT; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525).
